{% extends "marketplace/vendor/base.html" %} {% load i18n %} {% load static %} {% block title %}{% if product %}{% trans "编辑商品" %}{% else %}{% if public_publish_mode %}{% trans "发布广告" %}{% else %}{% trans "新增商品" %}{% endif %}{% endif %} - {{ vendor.company_name }}{% endblock %} {% block nav_products %}active{% endblock %} {% block extra_vendor_css %} @import url("{% static 'css/media_upload_progress.css' %}"); .vendor-form-shell { display:grid; grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1.35fr) minmax(340px,.82fr); gap:24px; } .vendor-form-card { background:#fff; border-radius:24px; padding:26px; box-shadow:0 16px 44px rgba(15,23,42,.08); border:1px solid rgba(29,78,216,.12); } .vendor-form-title { font-size:1.05rem; font-weight:800; color:#1e293b; margin-bottom:18px; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; } .vendor-form-title i { color:#1d4ed8; } .vendor-form-card .form-label { font-weight:700; color:#334155; font-size:.88rem; } .vendor-form-card .form-control, .vendor-form-card .form-select, .vendor-form-card .input-group-text { border-radius:12px; min-height:46px; } .vendor-form-card textarea.form-control { min-height:130px; } .vendor-form-card .form-control, .vendor-form-card .form-select { border:1.5px solid #dbe3f3; box-shadow:none; } .vendor-form-card .form-control:focus, .vendor-form-card .form-select:focus { border-color:#1d4ed8; box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(29,78,216,.12); } .vendor-side-stack { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:24px; } .attr-row { background:#f8fafc; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:14px; padding:12px; } .quick-preset { border-radius:999px; } .preview-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr)); gap:14px; } .preview-box { border:1.5px dashed #cbd5e1; border-radius:16px; padding:14px; text-align:center; background:#fafbff; } .preview-thumb { width:100%; aspect-ratio:1/1; object-fit:cover; border-radius:12px; margin-bottom:10px; background:#eef2ff; } .helper-text { font-size:.78rem; color:#64748b; } .form-actions { display:flex; gap:12px; flex-wrap:wrap; } .form-actions .btn { border-radius:999px; padding:12px 24px; font-weight:700; } .vendor-form-hero { background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0f172a,#2563eb 55%,#22c55e); color:#fff; border-radius:26px; padding:26px; margin-bottom:24px; box-shadow:0 18px 45px rgba(15,23,42,.22); } .vendor-form-hero h4 { font-weight:900; margin-bottom:8px; } .vendor-form-hero p { opacity:.82; margin:0; } .switch-card { background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f8fafc,#eef2ff); border:1px solid #dbe3f3; border-radius:16px; padding:16px; } .chips-wrap { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:10px; } .chip-option { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; padding:10px 14px; border-radius:999px; border:1px solid #dbe3f3; background:#fff; font-size:.82rem; font-weight:700; } .mini-note { font-size:.8rem; color:#64748b; } @media (max-width: 991.98px) { .vendor-form-shell { grid-template-columns:1fr; } .vendor-side-stack { order:-1; } } @media (max-width: 767.98px) { .vendor-form-card { padding:18px; border-radius:16px; } .preview-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr; } .form-actions { flex-direction:column-reverse; } .form-actions .btn { width:100%; justify-content:center; } .page-header-card .d-flex { flex-direction:column; align-items:flex-start !important; gap:12px; } } {% endblock %} {% block vendor_content %}
商品发布工作台

{% if product %}编辑商品{% else %}{% if public_publish_mode %}发布广告{% else %}新增商品{% endif %}{% endif %}

{% endif %}

{{ form_state.errors.description }}
{% endif %}
Ajoutez une description claire, utile et rassurante pour améliorer la conversion.

{{ form_state.errors.price }}
{% endif %}

{{ form_state.errors.stock }}
{% endif %}
{% if form_state.errors.min_order_quantity %}
{{ form_state.errors.min_order_quantity }}
{% endif %}
Nombre minimum de pièces par commande.
{% if form_state.errors.max_order_quantity %}
{{ form_state.errors.max_order_quantity }}
{% endif %}
Optionnel. Laissez vide pour aucune limite.
{% if form_state.errors.quantity_step %}
{{ form_state.errors.quantity_step }}
{% endif %}
Ex: 12 pour vendre par carton de 12.
{% if form_state.errors.seller_phone %}
{{ form_state.errors.seller_phone }}
{% endif %}
Attributs produit

Comme dans l’admin marketplace, vous pouvez définir les spécifications et options d’affichage du produit.

{% if product %} {% for attr in product.attributes.all %}
{% endfor %} {% endif %}

Réglages produit
{% if form_state.errors.category %}
{{ form_state.errors.category }}
{% endif %}

{% include "marketplace/includes/pricing_rules_form.html" %}
Images & vidéo du produit
{% for slot in '12345' %}
{% if slot == '1' and product and product.image %} {% elif slot == '2' and product and product.image_2 %} {% elif slot == '3' and product and product.image_3 %} {% elif slot == '4' and product and product.image_4 %} {% elif slot == '5' and product and product.image_5 %} {% else %}{% endif %}
{% endfor %}
{% if product and product.video %} {% else %}{% endif %}
{% if form_state.errors.image %}
{{ form_state.errors.image }}
{% endif %}
{% if public_publish_mode %}Au moins 2 photos sont requises pour publier une annonce.{% else %}Au moins 1 photo est requise (2 ou plus recommandées).{% endif %} Jusqu'à 5 images et 1 courte vidéo.
